commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `looksLikePromptInjection` guard to `memory_store` before embedding/search/storage and adds regression tests for rejected prompt-like text plus an accepted normal preference memory.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +97. Total +112 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection gives a clear path: current main embeds explicit `memory_store` text without checking `looksLikePromptInjection`, but I did not run a real or local tool-harness reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed for the proof gap, failing type-check lane, and maintainer acceptance of the fail-closed memory-store compatibility change; no narrow automated repair is identified from the available evidence.

target.title: fix(memory): reject prompt-like memory stores
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens the memory LanceDB plugin so explicit `memory_store` calls reject prompt-like instruction payloads before they reach embeddings or persistent storage.

## Changes

- Reuses the existing `looksLikePromptInjection(text)` heuristic in the explicit `memory_store` tool path.
- Returns a rejected tool result with `reason: "prompt_injection_detected"` before embedding, duplicate search, or LanceDB writes.
- Adds regression coverage for the rejected path and for an ordinary preference memory still storing normally.

## Validation

- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-lancedb/index.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Notes

Internal tracking: #692. No `CHANGELOG.md` update.

### Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: explicit memory stores that look like prompt instructions are rejected before embedding or storage, while normal preference memories still store.
Real environment tested: local source checkout on Node v22.22.2 using the memory LanceDB plugin test harness.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-lancedb/index.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: the targeted test file passed with 47 tests, including the new rejection and accepted-storage regression.
Observed result after fix: the rejected payload returned `details.action = "rejected"` and did not call OpenAI embeddings or LanceDB; the clean preference memory returned `details.action = "created"` and wrote one memory.
What was not tested: full suite, live model/browser fetch flow, and packaged install smoke.
target.author: eleqtrizit
